name: Coho Vineyard — Full ERP Replacement
scope_summary: Full ERP replacement of legacy SAP B1 with D365 F&O. 27-month program with 6 entities. Phase 1 vendor (Avanade 30%) shows performance concerns. Existing Coho Vineyard ERP Modernization (Phase 0.5) currently Amber with scope re-baseline underway.

reference_projects: Coho Vineyard ERP Modernization (current Amber, scope re-baseline)
profile.ai_recommendation_text: FLAG FOR REJECTION in current state. Coho Vineyard Phase 0.5 is currently Amber with scope re-baseline in progress. Until Phase 0.5 stabilizes, signing a $4.5M follow-on is materially risky. 21% margin floor concerning. Required actions: (1) wait for Phase 0.5 to return to Green or complete revised SOW, (2) ARB assessment, (3) Avanade subcontract with explicit performance terms, (4) standard SOW template usage.
ai_conditions: Coho Phase 0.5 must return to Green before kickoff
Avanade subcontract with explicit SLA and indemnity
Margin floor review with Finance — 21% is below threshold
Risk Mitigation Plan signed by Delivery Principal

score_dimensions: Alignment to company priority pillars (Cloud, AI, Security, Dynamics, Data)
Inverse risk: solution complexity, deal size, vendor dependency
Scope completeness, exclusions, assumptions, acceptance criteria
Historical success rate on comparable engagements
Confidence in effort estimates based on complexity and comparables
Regulatory and compliance overhead (HIPAA, GDPR, SOX, FFIEC)
Reuse of playbooks, SOW templates, and delivery accelerators
Partner/subcontractor % — impact on margin and delivery control
Monthly ACR generated — strategic value to Microsoft ecosystem
